setting.name: The Hollowmarch
setting.author: Lantern & Blade Project
setting.description: A century after the Dawnlight Empire broke, its northernmost border — the Hollowmarch — is a quiet country of small villages, abandoned watch-houses, and ruins that are slowly waking. The Wardens of the Watch who once held the line are a memory; their lantern-work gathers dust in attics and underground; and the dark is patient.
